# Code of Conduct

This project is a personal blog. Interactions on this repository (issues, discussions) are expected to remain respectful and constructive.

Harassment, trolling, or any abusive behavior will not be tolerated. Violations can be reported at [contact@brandonvisca.com](mailto:contact@brandonvisca.com).

This Code of Conduct is adapted from the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org), version 2.0.
